summary: Patch 26.6 introduced Shyvana's major update, so old Shyvana coaching before March 17, 2026 should be treated as stale by default.
Several mid and support-adjacent outliers were adjusted, including Ahri and Pyke nerfs plus buffs for Azir, Cassiopeia and Lissandra.
Support farming restrictions were softened, which slightly changes how aggressively mage supports can collect stray lane gold without griefing their income.

championUpdates.summary: Shyvana received a full gameplay and visual update. Any pre-26.6 champion-specific advice is likely outdated.
Ahri was nerfed in 26.6, so older advice assuming stronger baseline lane control or kill pressure should be applied more carefully.
Azir received damage buffs, increasing his ability to contest lane and scale into teamfights.
Cassiopeia gained stronger mana and poison-payoff tools, which improves her trading reliability in lane.
Lissandra received meaningful buffs that make her mid-lane control and skirmish value more reliable.
Pyke was nerfed, so support coaching that leans on his prior roaming or kill thresholds should be re-checked.

systemUpdates.summary: Support item farming penalties were softened, which slightly changes how much minion income supports can absorb before being punished.
